final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover
Asset type: Xiaohongshu (小红书) 9-grid cover, vertical format
Primary request: collage-style 9-grid layout featuring DJI Pocket 4 product as a casual user-generated content aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: lifestyle flatlays and handheld POV shots, cozy home desk, outdoor street scenes, cafe setting
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera in various real-life usage scenarios, natural unpolished moments
Style/medium: authentic amateur photography, warm and approachable, slightly desaturated film-like tones
Composition/framing: 9-square grid layout, central title placement, each cell showing different angle or use case
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, cozy and relatable, casual everyday vibe
Color palette: warm beige, soft cream, muted pastels with orange/gray DJI product accents
Materials/textures: matte paper textures, fabric surfaces, natural wood, soft shadows
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: keep the amateur/casual aesthetic, no overly polished commercial look, cute and distinctive typography for title
Avoid: professional studio lighting, stock photo aesthetic, generic sans-serif fonts, over-saturated colors, watermark
